lessons.title: The For Loop 🔁
lessons.description: Repeat an action an exact number of times.

lessons.title: The While Loop ⏳
lessons.description: Keep repeating until a specific condition tells you to stop.

lessons.title: The Do-While Loop 🎬
lessons.description: A loop that guarantees it will run at least one time.

lessons.title: Break & Continue 🛑
lessons.description: Take full control! Stop a loop early or skip directly to the next round.
